element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Unlocks spirit summoning abilities throughout game
Unlimited usage, basic attacks and special moves
First of four spirits to acquire; found in shrines
Offensive capability; weapons can ignite targets
Limited durability unlike knife; provide tactical variety
Resource management during combat and exploration
Central conflict motivation; wields chaos and destruction

typical_relief_triggers: Shrine discoveries granting new spirit abilities
Safe map traversal between action areas
typical_tension_triggers: Special weapon durability depletion forcing knife reliance
Boss confrontations tied to silver armlet wielder
Spirit acquisition requirements in dangerous areas
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate pacing with adventure exploration balanced against action combat; tension builds through resource scarcity (weapon durability) and spirit acquisition progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Shrines containing spirits serve as discovery landmarks; off-path exploration rewards item pickups

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible entry point with knife combat and basic exploration; first spirit acquisition introduces magic mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating challenge as special weapons introduce durability management; multiple spirit abilities expand tactical options
difficulty_curve.late_game: Convergence toward final confrontation with silver armlet wielder; full spirit roster available for complex ability combinations
notable_spikes: Early shrine encounters requiring first spirit mastery
Mid-game weapon durability pressure forcing combat style adaptation
Final antagonist confrontation requiring integrated spirit usage

notable_level_patterns.description: Structured acquisition of four spirits (water, fire, shadow, plant) across shrines; each spirit unlocks new tactical and environmental puzzle solutions
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Shrine locations distributed throughout vast game world

notable_level_patterns.description: Limited-use special weapons (swords, crossbows, bombs) force players to manage combat resources; finding unlimited variants serves as progression reward
Large interconnected map encouraging non-linear exploration; item pickups and health/mana restoration scattered to reward thoroughness
